calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2026 Continued To Aug-05-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-15-2025 Continued To Apr-08-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Request For Stay
Off Calendar Aug-26-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Lior Barkodar, Esq. 310-405-2361 Barkodar Law Group for Plaintiff.
Jennifer Gomez, Esq. 628-222-9489 628-222-9489 jgomez@grsm.com; Sara Moore, Esq. 415-986-5900 smoore@grsm.com Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani LLP for Defendant Veritas.

Argued. Ms. Gomez requests the court adopt the tentative ruling in full. Mr. Barkodar contests and presents arguments. Mr. Barkodar states client could not locate the 13 page agreement; questions the authenticity of the agreement, requests an evidentiary hearing. The Court poses questions to Mr. Barkodar. After arguments, the Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT VERITAS INVESTMENTS, INC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration And Request For Stay.

Defendant Veritas Investments, Inc.'s motion to compel arbitration and stay the proceedings is Taken Under Submission.***

A proposed order is submitted prior to the hearing.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing, the court signs an order granting Defendant's motion to compel arbitration & request for stay is signed. (see scanned order for details)***
